more.title: Cyril Ramaphosa Meets Anti-Illegal Immigration Leaders Ahead Of Nationwide Protests
more.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa held an urgent meeting with leaders of the anti-illegal immigration movement on Monday, ahead of demonstrations planned across South Africa on 30 June. During the meeting, he urged organisers to ensure that all protests remain peaceful and lawful. The discussions took place as several groups prepared for nationwide demonstrations calling for stricter [...] The post Cyril Ramaphosa Meets Anti-Illegal Immigration Leaders Ahead Of Nationwide Protests appeared first on SurgeZirc SA .

more.title: SANTACO Confirms Taxi Operations Will Continue During June 30 Protests in South Africa
more.description: JOHANNESBURG, SOUTH AFRICA — The South African National Taxi Council (SANTACO) has officially confirmed that minibus taxi operations will proceed as usual during the planned nationwide protests on June 30, aiming to ensure commuter safety and business continuity across the country.
